title: Prose Ada
summary: Book 1 follows Ada's shift from observatory rationalist to active investigator of timeline convergence, ending at first direct contact with the Yggdrasil-like nexus.

narrative.newInfo: Canonical Book 1 scaffold established in ProSada.
narrative.dripHook: If the sky anomaly was not an external signal, what exactly made contact?
narrative.beautyHooks: Independent threads (myth, data, state suppression, inner cognition) converge into one geometric explanation.
narrative.notes: High-level initial draft intended for iterative refinement.
